nodes.name: continual-learning.json
nodes.summary: State file for the Cursor continual-learning hook, persisting accumulated learning metadata between editor sessions.

nodes.name: .DS_Store
nodes.summary: macOS Finder metadata file with no project significance; tracked incidentally in the repository root.

nodes.name: .gitattributes
nodes.summary: Git attributes file controlling line-ending normalization and diff behavior for tracked files.

nodes.name: .nvmrc
nodes.summary: Pins the Node.js version used by the monorepo for nvm-based toolchain consistency.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore patterns for the understand-anything analysis pipeline, excluding generated and vendored paths from scanning.

nodes.name: fingerprints.json
nodes.summary: Cached file fingerprints used by the understand-anything pipeline to detect changes between analysis runs.

nodes.name: ua-scan-files.json
nodes.summary: Temporary scan manifest enumerating all project files discovered by the understand-anything scanner.

nodes.name: .DS_Store
nodes.summary: macOS Finder metadata file in the apps directory with no project significance.

nodes.name: .npmrc
nodes.summary: npm configuration for the mobile app workspace, controlling registry and install behavior for Expo dependencies.

nodes.name: build.gradle
nodes.summary: Gradle build configuration for the Android app module, defining React Native plugin setup, SDK versions, signing configs, and build variants.

nodes.name: proguard-rules.pro
nodes.summary: ProGuard rules controlling code shrinking and obfuscation for Android release builds.

nodes.name: AndroidManifest.xml
nodes.summary: Debug-variant Android manifest overlay enabling debug permissions such as cleartext traffic for development.

nodes.name: AndroidManifest.xml
nodes.summary: Debug-optimized variant Android manifest overlay for an optimized debug build flavor.

nodes.name: AndroidManifest.xml
nodes.summary: Primary Android manifest declaring the application, main activity, permissions, and intent filters for the mobile app.

nodes.name: MainActivity.kt
nodes.summary: Android entry-point activity hosting the React Native runtime, configuring the main component name and React activity delegate.
nodes.languageNotes: Kotlin React Native activity subclassing ReactActivity with a delegate using the new architecture (Fabric) flags.

nodes.name: MainActivity
nodes.summary: React Native host activity that returns the JS module name 'main' and wires up the React activity delegate with Fabric/concurrent-root support.

nodes.name: MainApplication.kt
nodes.summary: Android Application class bootstrapping the React Native host, autolinked packages, and Expo/Soloader initialization on startup.

nodes.name: MainApplication
nodes.summary: Application subclass providing the ReactNativeHost, initializing SoLoader and the new architecture on onCreate, and handling configuration changes.

nodes.name: ic_launcher_background.xml
nodes.summary: Vector drawable defining the background layer of the adaptive Android launcher icon.

nodes.name: rn_edit_text_material.xml
nodes.summary: React Native Material-style drawable used for text input backgrounds on Android.

nodes.name: ic_launcher_round.xml
nodes.summary: Adaptive round launcher icon definition referencing foreground and background drawable layers.

nodes.name: ic_launcher.xml
nodes.summary: Adaptive launcher icon definition referencing foreground and background drawable layers.

nodes.name: gradle-daemon-jvm.properties
nodes.summary: Properties selecting the JVM toolchain used by the Gradle daemon for Android builds.

nodes.name: gradle-wrapper.properties
nodes.summary: Gradle wrapper configuration pinning the Gradle distribution version and download URL for reproducible builds.

nodes.name: gradlew
nodes.summary: POSIX shell wrapper script that downloads and runs the pinned Gradle distribution to drive Android builds.

nodes.name: babel.config.js
nodes.summary: Babel configuration for the mobile app, applying the Expo preset to transpile React Native/TypeScript sources.

nodes.name: .xcode.env
nodes.summary: Environment file exporting the Node binary path used by Xcode build phases for the iOS app.
